text: Iranian source to Al Jazeera: In light of Trump’s statements about holding negotiations and inconsistency with what is actually happening between Iran and the United States, we believe we’re facing a deception by the enemy and we’re on the verge of a new round of escalation.
text_zh: 伊朗消息人士向半岛电视台表示：鉴于特朗普关于举行谈判的声明与伊朗和美国之间实际发生的情况不符，我们认为我们正面临敌人的欺骗，并且正处于新一轮升级的边缘。

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇺🇸🇮🇷 Israeli Channel 12: U.S. President Trump stated that he feels good about a potential deal with Iran. “The concept of the deal is already closed. I think we have a very good chance of completing it,” he said. @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 Kan: Iran‑US talks are reaching a decisive stage, but sources say communication difficulties with Iran’s new supreme leader, Mojtaba Khamenei, may be behind Tehran’s erratic behaviour: the IRGC is pushing a confrontational line, while Foreign Minister Araghchi strikes a more peaceful tone. A Middle East source expressed optimism about extending the ceasefire. Israeli Prime Minister Netanyahu will hold a limited security consultation this evening, and the cabinet is set to convene tomorrow afternoon. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇺🇸🇮🇷 以色列第12频道：美国总统特朗普表示，他对与伊朗达成潜在协议感到乐观。他说：‘协议的概念已经敲定。我认为我们有很大的机会完成它。’ @wfwitness” ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 Kan：伊美会谈正进入决定性阶段，但有消息称，与伊朗新任最高领袖穆杰塔巴·哈梅内伊的沟通困难可能是德黑兰行为反复无常的原因：伊斯兰革命卫队正在推动对抗路线，而外交部长阿拉格希则采取了更温和的基调。一位中东消息人士对延长停火表示乐观。以色列总理内塔尼亚胡今晚将举行有限的安全磋商，内阁定于明天下午开会。 @wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 Israeli Channel 12: U.S. President Trump stated that he feels good about a potential deal with Iran. “The concept of the deal is already closed. I think we have a very good chance of completing it,” he said. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 以色列第12频道：美国总统特朗普表示，他对与伊朗达成潜在协议感到乐观。他说：‘协议的概念已经敲定。我认为我们有很大的机会完成它。’ @wfwitness

text: 🇮🇱 🇦🇷 ⚡️ War Criminal Netanyahu: “Any moment could bring new developments” – Bibi hints at major shifts during Milei visit 🚩 @RezistanceTrench
text_zh: 🇮🇱 🇦🇷 ⚡️ 战犯内塔尼亚胡：“任何时刻都可能带来新的进展”——比比在米莱访问期间暗示会有重大转变 🚩 @RezistanceTrench

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 Sources to MTV on the upcoming negotiations and ceasefire with Lebanon and Israel: The second preparatory meeting between Lebanon and israel will be held next Tuesday or Wednesday, during which the date and location of direct negotiations will be agreed upon. The extension of the ceasefire between Lebanon and israel will be raised during the preliminary meeting at a preliminary American request, and the extension options range from ten days to one month. The initial structure of the Lebanese negotiating delegation includes Simon Karam, an assisting civilian figure, and a specialized military figure. This structure is subject to change depending on the composition of the israeli delegation. The visit of the President of the Lebanese Republic to the United States in the coming days is an idea under consideration, but the issue of a meeting with Netanyahu is difficult and still not mature. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 消息人士向 MTV 透露关于黎巴嫩与以色列即将进行的谈判和停火的消息：黎巴嫩与以色列之间的第二次筹备会议将于下周二或周三举行，届时将商定直接谈判的日期和地点。在美方的初步要求下，黎以停火延期问题将在预备会议上提出，延期选项从十天到一个月不等。黎巴嫩谈判代表团的初步结构包括辅助文职人员西蒙·卡拉姆和一名专业军事人员。该结构可能会根据以色列代表团的组成而有所变动。黎巴嫩共和国总统在未来几天访问美国的想法正在考虑之中，但与内塔尼亚胡会面的问题很困难，目前尚不成熟。 @wfwitness

text: 📸 Israeli Merkava tank in the ruins of Bint Jbeil (southern Lebanon). The town is being rapidly destroyed by Israel.
text_zh: 📸 以色列梅卡瓦坦克在宾特朱拜勒（黎巴嫩南部）的废墟中。该镇正被以色列迅速摧毁。

text: Open Source Intel 600-700 square KM taken from Hezbollah and they still agreed to a ceasefire. Unprecedented. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2045904317589160225/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报：从真主党手中夺取了600-700平方公里的土地，他们竟然还同意停火。史无前例。 https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2045904317589160225/photo/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel Ghalibaf says Iran is holding the line on key demands, insisting Hezbollah must be part of any broader deal and that unresolved violations tied to the group cannot be ignored. He added that Tehran will not move forward unless frozen Iranian assets are released, framing both issues as preconditions for any further negotiations. tweet
text_zh: 开源情报：卡利巴夫表示，伊朗在关键要求上坚持立场，坚称真主党必须成为任何更广泛协议的一部分，且与该组织相关的未决违规行为不能被忽视。他补充说，除非解冻伊朗资产，否则德黑兰不会推进谈判，并将这两个问题作为进一步谈判的前提条件。推文

text: Open Source Intel Syria released footage showing the arrest of a Hezbollah-linked terror cell. Several rockets and launchers were seized. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2045903625801658738/video/1 Jolani’s security forces capturing a Hezbollah cell in Syria preparing to launch rockets toward Israel A sight to be seen. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2045896120585400441/photo/1 - Open Source Intel tweet
text_zh: 开源情报：叙利亚发布了逮捕一个与真主党有关的恐怖小组的视频。缴获了多枚火箭弹和发射器。 https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2045903625801658738/video/1 朱拉尼的安全部队在叙利亚抓获了一个准备向以色列发射火箭弹的真主党小组，场面壮观。 https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2045896120585400441/photo/1 - 开源情报推文

text: Open Source Intel UAEs Anwar Gargash: ״It is not possible to return to the previous pace in relations with Iran without a review, candor, and guarantees.״ https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2045901872976756934/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报：阿联酋的安瓦尔·加尔加什：“如果不进行审查、坦诚沟通并提供保证，就不可能恢复与伊朗关系的先前节奏。” https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2045901872976756934/photo/1 推文

text: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 Israeli explosions in the town of Taybeh, southern Lebanon. The town is indeed in the yellow line which the IDF is operating in. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 以色列在黎巴嫩南部泰贝镇（Taybeh）进行爆炸。该镇确实位于以色列国防军（IDF）正在行动的黄线区域内。 @wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇸🇾 Hezbollah has released a statement rejecting the accusations issued by the Syrian ministry of interior regarding an alleged cell aiming to launch missiles and destabilize Syria. @wfwitmess
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇸🇾 真主党发表声明，驳斥了叙利亚内政部关于所谓旨在发射导弹和破坏叙利亚稳定的团伙的指控。 @wfwitmess

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 IRNA: Iran has denied reports of a second round of negotiations in Islamabad. State media said U.S. excessive demands, unreasonable and unrealistic positions, constant contradictions, the ongoing naval blockade (which violates the ceasefire understanding), and threatening rhetoric have so far prevented progress. “In these circumstances, no clear outlook for productive talks is conceivable,” the report added, describing the U.S. announcements as a media game and a “blame game” to pressure Iran. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 伊朗伊斯兰共和国通讯社（IRNA）：伊朗否认了关于在伊斯兰堡进行第二轮谈判的报道。官方媒体称，美国的过分要求、不合理和不切实际的立场、持续的矛盾、正在进行的海上封锁（违反了停火谅解）以及威胁性言论，迄今为止阻碍了进展。报告补充说：“在这种情况下，无法设想富有成效的谈判有任何明确的前景”，并将美国的声明描述为媒体游戏和向伊朗施压的“指责游戏”。 @wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 Footage documents an Israeli soldier smashing the head of a statue of Jesus Christ in southern Lebanon. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 视频记录了一名以色列士兵在黎巴嫩南部砸碎了一尊耶稣基督雕像的头部。 @wfwitness

text: 🇺🇸 The Empire Strikes Back! ... a pathetic Lego counter-dis punch - with the AmeriKKKans using their own war crimes as glorious proof of them actually winning. 🐻 There's pathetic, there's dumb, there's idiotic - and then there's the US. They really do be this out of touch. Simply sad. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇺🇸 帝国反击战！……一场可悲的乐高式反击——美国人利用他们自己的战争罪行作为他们实际上正在获胜的光荣证据。🐻 有一种可悲，有一种愚蠢，有一种白痴——然后就是美国。他们真的如此脱离现实。简直可悲。🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: Nuno Felix RT @WeaponScientist : On the contrary, JDAM or SDB debris at the site of mass casualty events in Gaza and Lebanon is the opposite of good branding. The first and strongest opposition to this type of cheap and populist talk will come from the US defense industry. Israel is the best and cheapest marketing tool for US weapons. Worth trillions in sales and brand recognition. - Jonathan Conricus tweet
text_zh: Nuno Felix 转推 @WeaponScientist：相反，在加沙和黎巴嫩的大规模伤亡现场发现的 JDAM 或 SDB 碎片与良好的品牌形象恰恰相反。对这种廉价和民粹主义言论的第一次也是最强烈的反对将来自美国国防工业。以色列是美国武器最好、最便宜的营销工具。价值数万亿美元的销售额和品牌知名度。—— Jonathan Conricus 推文

text: Open Source Intel BREAKING: 🔴 A gunman killed 8 children and injured 2 adults in a shooting in Shreveport, Louisiana, in what officials described as a "domestic disturbance." The suspect was shot and killed by police. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2045899448971129316/photo/1 tweet

text: WarTranslated A Russian war correspondent writes Ukraine now dominates in drones and has a tactical edge on several fronts, while Russian air defense and comms are failing up to the Urals. He says Kyiv is preparing a summer 2026 counteroffensive. https://twitter.com/wartranslated/status/2045898484293771371/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: WarTranslated 一位俄罗斯战地记者写道，乌克兰现在在无人机方面占据主导地位，并在多个战线上拥有战术优势，而俄罗斯的防空和通信系统在乌拉尔地区之前就已经失效。他说基辅正在准备 2026 年夏季的反攻。https://twitter.com/wartranslated/status/2045898484293771371/photo/1 推文

text: OSINTdefender In a phone interview with morning with Fox News’ Trey Yingst, President Donald J. Trump stated regarding this week’s next round of peace talks with Iran in Islamabad, “If they don't sign this deal, the whole country is going to get blown up,” adding that bridges and power plants will be targeted throughout Iran. tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender 在今早接受福克斯新闻（Fox News）特雷·英斯特（Trey Yingst）的电话采访时，唐纳德·J·特朗普总统就本周在伊斯兰堡举行的下一轮伊朗和平谈判表示：“如果他们不签署这项协议，整个国家都将被炸毁”，并补充说伊朗各地的桥梁和发电厂都将成为目标。推文

text: Visioner RT @NSTRIKE1231 : ❗️ 🇮🇱 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 Israeli PM, Benjamin Netanyahu: Developments regarding Iran could happen at any minute. https://twitter.com/NSTRIKE1231/status/2045896426106875969/video/1 tweet

text: Nuno Felix RT @DakdaR22 : - Kaja Kallas: "Washington is not trying to manage Europe. It is trying to dissolve it. They do not like the European Union,.. The tactics,resemble those used by the EU's adversaries.. The answer is not bilateral deals with Trump. It is unity. Because when Europe stands together, it is an equal power. And that is exactly what Washington cannot stand." tweet
text_zh: Nuno Felix 转推 @DakdaR22：- 卡娅·卡拉斯（Kaja Kallas）：“华盛顿不是在试图管理欧洲。它是在试图瓦解欧洲。他们不喜欢欧盟……这些策略类似于欧盟对手所使用的策略……答案不是与特朗普达成双边协议。而是团结。因为当欧洲站在一起时，它就是一股平等的力量。而这正是华盛顿所无法忍受的。” 推文

text: Open Source Intel Iranian Parliament Speaker Mohammad Bagher Ghalibaf said during recent negotiations, Iran demanded that Hezbollah be treated as part of the agreement, saying any violations involving the group must be resolved before Tehran would discuss the “10 points.” https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2045894951850963411/video/1 tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 伊朗议会议长穆罕默德·巴格尔·卡利巴夫（Mohammad Bagher Ghalibaf）在最近的谈判中表示，伊朗要求将真主党视为协议的一部分，并称在德黑兰讨论“10点建议”之前，任何涉及该组织的违规行为都必须得到解决。https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2045894951850963411/video/1 推文

text: WarTranslated A Russian occupier shows the aftermath of Ukraine’s April 2 drone strike that flattened a command post. Exilenova+ writes the site had multiple sections and a hangar. If the Russian occupier is telling the truth the scale of damage from the drones is striking. https://twitter.com/wartranslated/status/2045894161098850745/video/1 tweet
text_zh: WarTranslated 一名俄罗斯占领者展示了乌克兰 4 月 2 日无人机袭击后的残骸，该袭击夷平了一个指挥所。Exilenova+ 写道，该地点有多个部分和一个机库。如果这名俄罗斯占领者所言属实，那么无人机造成的破坏规模令人震惊。https://twitter.com/wartranslated/status/2045894161098850745/video/1 推文

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 The IDF announced that the 162nd Division has killed more than 250 alleged Hezbollah members, dismantling over 405 infrastructure sites and located upwards of more than 1,000 weapons and munitions in southern Lebanon, south of the forward defence or yellow line. During one operation, troops found body cameras belonging to a Hezbollah group that had moved south early in the war and taken up position in a tunnel to ambush Israeli forces. While waiting, the members filmed videos and personal farewell statements. An IDF drone entered the tunnel; one member fired at it, exposing the cell. Troops dropped a grenade into the shaft, killing the operative. The rare GoPro footage was recovered before it could be sent back to Hezbollah. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 以色列国防军宣布，第 162 师在黎巴嫩南部前沿防御线或黄线以南击毙了 250 多名所谓的真主党成员，拆除了 405 多个基础设施点，并发现了 1,000 多件武器和弹药。在一次行动中，部队发现了属于一个真主党小组的随身摄像机，该小组在战争初期向南移动并进入隧道阵地以伏击以色列军队。在等待期间，成员们拍摄了视频和个人告别声明。一架以色列国防军无人机进入隧道；一名成员向其开火，暴露了该小组的位置。部队向竖井投掷了一枚手榴弹，击毙了该武装人员。这些罕见的 GoPro 镜头在被送回真主党之前被找回。@wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 Israel Hayom: Iran has agreed to surrender all of its enriched uranium. The destination – whether Russia or the IAEA – remains unclear. Progress has also been reported on the issue of regional proxy funding, though Iran is demanding to continue providing what it calls “non‑military” aid. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 《今日以色列》：伊朗已同意交出其所有浓缩铀。目的地是俄罗斯还是国际原子能机构尚不清楚。在资助地区代理人问题上也据报取得了进展，尽管伊朗要求继续提供其所谓的“非军事”援助。 @wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇺🇸🇵🇰🇮🇷CNN: The White House confirmed that U.S. Vice President Vance will be in Pakistan for the next round of negotiations with Iran, despite U.S. President Trump denying that he will. A White House official commented on the conflicting messages of the…" ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇵🇰 🇮🇷 CNN: It’s very likely that the Iranian delegation will arrive in Pakistan on Tuesday for negotiations with the U.S. Iranian sources report that the delegation will likely be of the same composition. They also report that they expect a symbolic joint announcement of a ceasefire extension. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇺🇸🇵🇰🇮🇷CNN：白宫证实，尽管美国总统特朗普否认，但美国副总统万斯仍将前往巴基斯坦进行下一轮与伊朗的谈判。一位白宫官员就这些相互矛盾的信息评论称……” ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇵🇰 🇮🇷 CNN：伊朗代表团极有可能于周二抵达巴基斯坦与美国进行谈判。伊朗消息人士称，代表团的组成可能保持不变。他们还表示，预计将发表一份象征性的停火延期联合声明。 @wfwitness

text: Nuno Felix “No one understands the IRGC or Iran” is one hell of a take…. @vtchakarova - Trent Telenko tweet
text_zh: 努诺·费利克斯（Nuno Felix）说“没有人了解伊斯兰革命卫队或伊朗”，这真是一个惊人的观点…… @vtchakarova - 特伦特·特连科（Trent Telenko）推文

text: Netanyahu: Every time Javier Milei visits Israel, it's right before something very big happens. Who knows what tomorrow or the day after tomorrow will bring?
text_zh: 内塔尼亚胡：哈维尔·米莱（Javier Milei）每次访问以色列，都是在重大事件发生之前。谁知道明天或后天会发生什么呢？

text: Netanyahu on Iran: We have achieved enormous things. It's not over yet. Any moment could bring us new developments.
text_zh: 内塔尼亚胡谈伊朗：我们已经取得了巨大的成就。但这还没有结束。任何时刻都可能带来新的进展。

text: Netanyahu to Argentina's Milei: I salute you, my friend. I think the free world should salute you.
text_zh: 内塔尼亚胡对阿根廷总统米莱说：我向你致敬，我的朋友。我认为自由世界都应该向你致敬。

text: A Turkish proverb feels like a perfect summary of the Iran war: “They asked the dog, ‘Why are you barking?’ ‘To scare them,’ he said. ‘Then why are you wagging your tail?’ they asked. ‘Because I’m scared too,’ he replied.”
text_zh: 一句土耳其谚语似乎是对伊朗战争的完美总结：“人们问狗：‘你为什么叫？’它说：‘为了吓唬他们。’‘那你为什么又摇尾巴呢？’人们问。‘因为我也很害怕，’它回答道。”

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 CBS: An Iranian national has been arrested at Los Angeles International Airport on suspicion of involvement in weapons trafficking. Authorities allege the individual was connected to efforts to procure or facilitate the transfer of weapons, raising national security concerns. Officials have not released full details of the charges, and the investigation remains ongoing. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 CBS：一名伊朗公民在洛杉矶国际机场被捕，涉嫌参与武器走私。当局指控该个人与获取或协助转移武器的活动有关，引发了国家安全担忧。官员尚未公布指控的全部细节，调查仍在进行中。 @wfwitness

text: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇺🇸 Prof. Marandi responds to Trump 🚩 @RezistanceTrench
text_zh: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇺🇸 马兰迪教授回应特朗普 🚩 @RezistanceTrench

text: The Strokes closed their Weekend 2 set at Coachella with a video condemning U.S. foreign policy and Israeli bombings in Gaza, including footage of bombings in Iran. Frontman Julian Casablancas emphasized the message with the refrain “What side you standing on?”
text_zh: The Strokes乐队在科切拉音乐节第二个周末的演出结束时播放了一段视频，谴责美国的外交政策和以色列对加沙的轰炸，其中包括伊朗遭轰炸的画面。主唱朱利安·卡萨布兰卡斯通过副歌“你站在哪一边？”强调了这一信息。

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇦 Two gunmen opened fire in Chernihiv, Ukraine, earlier this Sunday morning. Police quickly arrested one of the men who was armed with a starter gun after being called to the scene. There are no reports of casualties as of time of writing. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇦 本周日清晨，两名枪手在乌克兰切尔尼戈夫开火。警方接到报警后迅速赶到现场，逮捕了其中一名持有发令枪的男子。截至发稿时，暂无人员伤亡报告。 @wfwitness

text: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇺🇸 Iranian officials have not yet confirmed the participation of the Iranian delegation in the negotiations. Iran does not expect much from the upcoming round of talks, but if successful, it could pave the way for extending the ceasefire. 🚩 @RezistanceTrench
text_zh: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇺🇸 伊朗官员尚未确认伊朗代表团是否参加谈判。伊朗对即将到来的谈判轮次不抱太大期望，但如果成功，可能会为延长停火协议铺平道路。 🚩 @RezistanceTrench

text: 🇱🇧 An image has surfaced of an Israeli soldier smashing the head of a Jesus Christ statue, reportedly taken during recent Israeli occupation operations in southern Lebanon. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇱🇧 一张以色列士兵砸毁耶稣基督雕像头部的照片流出，据报道拍摄于近期以色列在黎巴嫩南部的占领行动期间。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: Trump reacted angrily after a U.S. jet was shot down in Iran, at one point yelling at aides and referencing Jimmy Carter and the 1979 hostage crisis. During the high-risk mission to rescue a downed U.S. airman, advisers did not include Trump in real-time operational discussions, instead updating him at key moments because they believed his impatience would not be helpful. Source: WSJ
text_zh: 在美国一架喷气式飞机在伊朗被击落后，特朗普反应激烈，一度对助手大吼大叫，并提到了吉米·卡特和1979年的人质危机。在营救被击落的美国飞行员的高风险任务中，顾问们没有让特朗普参与实时行动讨论，而是在关键时刻才向他通报情况，因为他们认为他的急躁无济于事。来源：华尔街日报

text: Open Source Intel Israeli drone struck a motorcycle in Nuseirat camp in central Gaza. One killed, three injured. - Gaza health sources https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2045885250526490946/video/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报：以色列无人机袭击了加沙中部努赛赖特难民营的一辆摩托车。造成一人死亡，三人受伤。 - 加沙卫生部门消息 https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2045885250526490946/video/1 推文

text: Visioner RT @NSTRIKE1231 : 🇺🇸 U.S. Apache helicopters operating near the Strait of Hormuz during the naval blockade against Iran. See the latest updates with us: @NSTRIKE1231 https://twitter.com/NSTRIKE1231/status/2045884842382893485/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: Visioner 转发 @NSTRIKE1231 : 🇺🇸 美国阿帕奇直升机在针对伊朗的海上封锁期间在霍尔木兹海峡附近行动。与我们一起查看最新动态： @NSTRIKE1231 https://twitter.com/NSTRIKE1231/status/2045884842382893485/photo/1 推文

text: WarTranslated Orban says Brussels passed word Ukraine is ready to restart oil via the Druzhba pipeline on Monday if Hungary lifts its block on the EU loan worth €90 billion, no oil no money, and once flows resume they will drop the block, adding the loan disbursement brings no burden or obligation to Hungary. tweet
text_zh: WarTranslated：欧尔班表示，布鲁塞尔传话称，如果匈牙利解除对欧盟900亿欧元贷款的封锁，乌克兰准备在周一重启通过友谊输油管道的石油运输。没有石油就没有钱，一旦流量恢复，他们将取消封锁，并补充说贷款发放不会给匈牙利带来任何负担或义务。推文
